title: lathyrus nevadensis var. nevadensis
intro: Lathyrus nevadensis var. nevadensis, also known as the Nevada pea, is a perennial legume that belongs to the pea family and is native to the mountainous regions of North America. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to reduce inflammation and ease respiratory issues, making it a potential remedy for conditions such as bronchitis and asthma. The health benefits of Lathyrus nevadensis var. nevadensis include its antiseptic and antioxidant properties, which can help to protect against infections and promote overall well-being. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to support respiratory health and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu.
